disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe, exquisite, focal pain over the front of the neck for five days, tender to the lightest touch, made much worse by swallowing and turning the head
trigger_question_examples: Where exactly is the pain and how bad is it?
What makes the neck pain better or worse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's right in the front of my neck, incredibly tender — even a light touch is agony — and swallowing or turning my head makes it far worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain radiates up into the jaw, ears and occiput bilaterally
trigger_question_examples: Do your ears or jaw hurt?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — it shoots up into my jaw and both ears, and round to the back of my head.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A febrile upper-respiratory viral illness about three weeks before the neck pain began
trigger_question_examples: Were you unwell with a cold or flu in the weeks before this started?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, I had a nasty cold about three weeks ago, before all of this started.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: High fever with drenching sweats and severe systemic malaise
trigger_question_examples: How unwell do you feel in yourself?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had a high fever and I'm sweating through my clothes — I feel completely wiped out.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Palpitations, heat intolerance and a fine hand tremor developing over the last 48 hours
trigger_question_examples: Have you felt hot, shaky or sweaty lately?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My heart keeps racing and pounding, I feel hot all the time, and my hands have a fine shake.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Odynophagia so severe that oral intake has dropped and dehydration is a risk
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to drink and swallow?
How much have you had to drink today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It hurts so much to swallow that I've barely had anything to drink all day.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No relief from regular paracetamol and ibuprofen
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for the pain, and did it help?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been taking paracetamol and ibuprofen regularly and they've made no difference at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No difficulty breathing, no drooling or inability to swallow saliva, no voice change at present (airway screen)
trigger_question_examples: Can you still swallow your own saliva, and has your voice changed?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My breathing is okay and I can still swallow my saliva — it's just the pain that's unbearable.
